headline: Truist Maintains Hold on Medtronic (MDT), Seeks Stronger EPS Growth
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is included among the Top 10 Income Stocks with the Highest Upside Potential. On June 4, Truist reduced its price recommendation on Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) to $86 from $95. It reiterated a Hold rating on the shares. The firm pointed to a stronger-than-expected fourth quarter on the revenue side, with organic revenue […]

headline: Is Zimmer Biomet Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Zimmer Biomet has lagged the broader S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain on the sidelines as they weigh the company's steady fundamentals against its modest growth outlook.

headline: Medtronic closes Scientia Vascular takeover, continuing M&A streak
summary: CEO Geoff Martha said the acquisition will enable “every neurovascular procedure to start with Medtronic.”
